author: jsign
content:
New release of `projects/zkevm` specs and tests: [zkevm@v0.3.3](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-spec-tests/releases/tag/zkevm%40v0.3.3)

Quick summary:
- It is built on top of the recently created [bal@v5.6.1](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-spec-tests/releases/tag/bal%40v5.6.1).
- Reg specs, it contains fixes, tighter checks and overall simplifications.
- Reg tests:
   - Construction correctness: it has new tests for SLOAD and CALL scenarios.
   - Invalid execution witness for stateless execution: it has nine new tests covering different scenarios of invalid `executionWitness.state`

More details in the [release description](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-spec-tests/releases/tag/zkevm%40v0.3.3).
